settings.heading: How to request a quote
settings.content:
Send us:

  • Product names
  • Quantity or budget
  • Required pack size
  • Delivery city
  • Deadline
  • Branding/customization requirement if any

settings.heading: Custom sourcing
settings.content: If a product is not listed, share its name, quantity and intended use. We will check availability and guide you.

settings.heading: Bulk & Corporate Orders
settings.intro: Morganics supports bulk orders, corporate gifting and custom pantry requirements for teams, families, events and seasonal occasions.
settings.cta_text: Send product names, quantity or budget, required pack size, delivery city, deadline and any branding or customization requirement.
